title: 10 best herbal creams for oily hair
description: Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, creams helps with oily hair because of its natural astringent and antiseptic properties. The herb's ability to balance the scalp's pH levels and reduce inflammation helps to minimize oil production. This results in a reduction of greasiness and an improvement in the overall appearance and feel of the hair.
